sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1795" key="a)e/twsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀέτωσις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n1795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arched roof</tr_> of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χελώνη,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:13:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
